zh.lifeSummary: Roger Kyngdon是Walter Kyngdon和Margaret Pincombe的兒子，於1393年出生在英國可瓦爾奎瑟頓可。他和Johanna至少有12個兒子和6個女兒。他去世於1462年3月3日在英國英格蘭可瓦爾奎瑟頓可享年69歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭可瓦爾奎瑟頓可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Roger Kyngdon是Walter Kyngdon和Margaret Pincombe的儿子，于1393年出生在英国可瓦爾奎瑟頓可。他和Johanna至少有12个儿子和6个女儿。他去世于1462年3月3日在英国英格兰可瓦爾奎瑟頓可享年69岁，埋葬在英国英格兰可瓦爾奎瑟頓可。

nameMeanings.name: Kyngdon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (southwestern, especially Devon): habitational name from Higher Kingdon in Alverdiscott, or from Kendon in North Bovey, both in Devon. Both are named in Old English from cyning ‘king’ (see King ) or cyne- ‘royal’ + dūn ‘hill’.

variants.name: King
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English king ‘king’ (Old English cyning, cyng), perhaps acquired by someone with kingly qualities or as a pageant name by someone who had acted the part of a king or had been chosen as the master of ceremonies or ‘king’ of an event such as a tournament, festival or folk ritual. In North America, the surname King has absorbed several European cognates and equivalents with the same meaning, for example German König (see Koenig ) and Küng, French Roy , Slovenian, Croatian, or Serbian Kralj , Polish Krol . It is also very common among African Americans. It is also found as an artificial Jewish surname.
English: occasionally from the Middle English personal name King, originally an Old English nickname from the vocabulary word cyning, cyng ‘king’.
Irish: adopted for a variety of names containing the syllable rí (which means ‘king’ in Irish).

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: Roger Kyngdon was born in 1393, in Quethiock, Cornwall, England as the son of Walter Kyngdon and Margaret Pincombe. He had at least 12 sons and 6 daughters with Johanna. He died on 3 March 1462, in Quethiock, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 69, and was buried in Quethiock, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Roger Kyngdon est né en 1393, à Quethiock, Cornouailles, Angleterre, fils de Walter Kyngdon et Margaret Pincombe. Il a eu au moins 12 fils et 6 filles avec Johanna. Il est décédé le 3 mars 1462, à Quethiock, Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterré à Quethiock, Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Roger Kyngdon wurde 1393 in Quethiock, Cornwall, England, als Sohn von Walter Kyngdon und Margaret Pincombe geboren. Er hatte mit Johanna mindestens 12 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb am 3. März 1462 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Quethiock, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Quethiock, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Roger Kyngdon è nato il nel 1393 nel Quethiock, Cornwall, England come figlio di Walter Kyngdon e Margaret Pincombe. Lui avuto almeno 12 figli e 6 figlie con Johanna. Morì il 3 marzo 1462, nel Quethiock, Cornwall, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 69 anni, e fu sepolto a Quethiock, Cornwall, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Roger Kyngdonは1393年にイギリスコルンワルクエスイオックでWalter KyngdonとMargaret Pincombeの息子として生まれた。彼はJohannaとの間に少なくとも12人の息子と6人の娘をもうけた。彼は1462年3月3日にイギリスイギリスコルンワルクエスイオックで69歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスコルンワルクエスイオックにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Roger Kyngdon(은)는 1393년 영국 코른월 크스이오c크에서 Walter Kyngdon(와)과 Margaret Pincombe의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Johanna(와)과 적어도 열 명 이상의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1462년 3월 3일 영국 잉글랜드 코른월 크스이오c크에서 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 코른월 크스이오c크에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Roger Kyngdon nasceu em 1393, em Quethiock, Cornwall, Inglaterra filho de Walter Kyngdon e Margaret Pincombe. Ele teve pelo menos 12 filhos e 6 filhas com Johanna. Ele faleceu em 3 de março de 1462, em Quethiock, Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 69 anos, e foi sepultado em Quethiock, Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Roger Kyngdon родился в 1393 г. в местности куетиокк, корнвалл, Англия. Его родителей звали Walter Kyngdon и Margaret Pincombe. У него было по крайней мере 12 сыновей и 6 дочерей от Johanna. Он умер 3 марта 1462 г. в местности куетиокк, корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 69 лет и был похоронен в местности куетиокк, корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Roger Kyngdon nació en 1393, en Quethiock, Cornwall, Inglaterra como hijo de Walter Kyngdon y Margaret Pincombe. Tuvo por lo menos 12 hijos y 6 hijas con Johanna. Murió el 3 de marzo de 1462, en Quethiock, Cornwall, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 69 años, y fue sepultado en Quethiock, Cornwall, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
